MINI MINUTES: This cause came on this dates regularly scheduled calendar. Present:Commissioner:Loretta M. Norris, Clerk:John Stokes, Reporter:Valerie Papale. All parties present except defendant Enrique Hernandez. Plaintiff represented by David Mendez, Esq. Case settled on the record as to defendant Kenneth Caraang. Case still open for jury trial as to defendant Enrique Hernandez.
